summary: Print Configuration and Help Guide Editor features in Dev Control admin section - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 16/16 API tests pass. Frontend: All UI flows work correctly.
passed_tests: Print Templates API: GET /api/print/templates returns list of templates
Print Templates API: POST /api/print/templates creates new template from scratch
Print Templates API: POST /api/print/templates with clone_from clones existing template
Print Templates API: PUT /api/print/templates/{id} updates template config
Print Templates API: PUT /api/print/templates/{id} saves font family and font size changes
Print Templates API: POST /api/print/templates/{id}/activate sets template as active
Print Templates API: DELETE active template returns 400 (cannot delete active)
Print Templates API: DELETE inactive template removes it
Print Templates API: DELETE non-existent returns 404
Help Guide API: GET /api/dev-control/help-guide returns guide content (admin)
Help Guide API: PUT /api/dev-control/help-guide saves guide to database
Help Guide API: Guide persists to MongoDB (source: database)
Help Guide API: Can add new section and persist
Help Guide API: GET /api/help-guide/content (public, no auth) returns guide
Help Guide API: Public endpoint reflects admin changes
Help Guide API: PUT with missing guide returns 400
UI: Print Config tab loads in Dev Control
UI: Print Config shows 2 templates with cards
UI: New Template button visible and clickable
UI: Clone from dropdown visible in create form
UI: Edit template shows font family dropdown (Verdana, Arial, etc)
UI: Edit template shows font size dropdown (8px-16px)
UI: Font preview shows styled text
UI: Header config checkboxes (Show Date, Order ID, Logo)
UI: Body config checkboxes (Checkboxes, Code, Name, Qty, Price, Status)
UI: Footer config checkboxes and signature label input
UI: Save button saves template changes
UI: Activate button sets template as active
UI: Help Guide Editor tab loads with structured form
UI: Guide Title input editable
UI: Introduction textarea editable
UI: 10+ sections visible with collapse/expand
UI: Section editors show title, type, content, image fields
UI: Add Section button adds new section
UI: Structured/Code mode toggle works
UI: Code mode shows raw JSON with valid structure
UI: Save button saves help guide (toast: 'Help guide saved')
UI: Preview button visible to open /help-guide
Public /help-guide: Renders title from database
Public /help-guide: Renders intro from database
Public /help-guide: Renders all sections dynamically
Public /help-guide: Shows images in sections
seed_data_creation: Test templates (TEST_NewTemplate, TEST_ClonedTemplate) created during API tests and cleaned up. Help guide modified with test title/intro for verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Print Config and Help Guide Editor features in Dev Control are fully functional. Print templates stored in 'print_templates' collection. Help guide stored in 'help_guide_content' collection. Print format config in 'app_config' with config_key='print_format'. When template is activated, its format_config is applied to print_format. Public /help-guide renders from API at /api/help-guide/content.
